creative_direction.reasoning: Full-bleed 9:16 portrait photograph of two creator-founders in a thread/craft shop, with headline text sandwiched top and bottom. Photography is the ad; typography is overlay. Image-gen produces the full environmental portrait. Track B ideal for headline text accuracy.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Creator-cast full-bleed portrait of two young makers with a split headline 'KICKSTART YOUR / BUSINESS' — cast the audience.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 full-bleed editorial lifestyle portrait: two young creator-founders (one with bleach-blonde shaggy hair in denim jacket over striped blue-and-white shirt; one with chunky streaked cropped hair in a cream knit sweater vest) stand side-by-side in what looks like a craft supply / thread shop, both smiling down at a black laptop on a counter in front of them. Behind them: a wall of colorful thread spools on hooks. Top 20% of canvas: white ExtraBold all-caps headline 'KICKSTART YOUR'. Bottom 15%: white ExtraBold all-caps headline 'BUSINESS'. Shopify wordmark + bag logo centered top in white.

subject.description: Two creator-founders, Gen Z styling, non-traditional — NOT polished talent/models, should feel like real creative people
subject.left_subject: young person, bleach blonde shaggy shoulder-length hair parted middle, denim jacket open over a blue-and-white striped collared shirt, a pale hand resting on counter, gold/chain jewelry subtle; relaxed smile
subject.right_subject: young person with short cropped hair with chunky streaks (dark + gray), cream-colored woven knit sweater vest over a white top, gold earrings, tattoo visible on arm, relaxed confident smile
subject.action: both looking down at a MacBook laptop on the counter in front of them, clearly in conversation/collaboration, not posed for camera
subject.position_in_frame: standing side-by-side, subjects fill center 60% of canvas, occupying middle 55% vertical

environment.location: craft supply or thread shop, daylight from camera-right
environment.background_elements: wall with horizontal rods from which hang hundreds of thread spools in pastel pinks/oranges/purples/greens/blues; some denim hanging on the left; a pair of scissors visible on the counter

camera.distance: medium (both subjects framed from waist up)

lighting.fill: ambient bounce from pastel thread wall

composition.eye_flow: top line → subjects' faces → bottom line

style_directives: editorial / lookbook photography (reference: Glossier, Parade, Airbnb host campaigns)
casting should feel authentic — real-looking creators, not professional models

text_elements_in_image.font: Shopify Sans ExtraBold (condensed) or Inter ExtraBold

negative_prompt: no 'smile at camera' energy — subjects must be engaged with laptop
no generic retail store (specifically: thread wall)

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate the full-bleed portrait only. All typography overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 editorial lifestyle portrait — see Track A subject + environment. NO overlay typography, NO Shopify logo, NO headline text anywhere.
nano_banana_json.color_palette: See Track A minus overlay white.

elements.font_family: Shopify Sans ExtraBold or Inter ExtraBold (condensed)

assets.name: Shopify logo (shopping bag + wordmark)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Small Shopify shopping bag icon (green S-shape inside bag) + 'shopify' lowercase wordmark, in white, ~34px tall.

patterns_exemplified: B8 text sandwich on full-bleed portrait
prompt_writer_training_notes: Casting language is CRITICAL — explicitly say 'real creator-founders, not professional models', 'non-traditional styling', 'Gen Z aesthetic'. Default image gen produces generic stock-model energy. Environment specificity (thread wall) is what makes it read as 'maker culture'; vague 'craft shop' wouldn't get there. Text sandwich split position (y:9-22% top, y:82-94% bottom) is a specific Reels-optimized layout — leaves room for Meta's platform CTA bar.
